sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84477" key="poliorkhth/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολῐορκ-ητήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">α</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n84477.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πολιορκητικός, μηχαναί</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0648.tlg001.perseus-grc1:42:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42.3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
